input: Set up CI/CD for a Node.js app with GitHub Actions, Docker image build, and deployment to AWS ECS

output.dockerfile:
FROM node:20-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci --production
COPY . .
RUN npm run build
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["node", "dist/index.js"]
output.github_actions:
name: Deploy
on: [push]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials@v4
        with:
          role-to-assume: ${{ secrets.AWS_ROLE_ARN }}
          aws-region: us-east-1
      - run: docker build -t app:${{ github.sha }} .
      - run: docker tag app:${{ github.sha }} ${{ secrets.ECR_REGISTRY }}/app:latest
      - run: docker push ${{ secrets.ECR_REGISTRY }}/app:latest

input: Create Docker container for Python dev environment with VS Code Remote Containers support

output.docker_run:
docker run -d --name py-dev-container \
  -v $(pwd):/workspace:rw \
  --user vscode:vscode \
  python:3.12-slim-bookworm \
  sleep infinity
setup: VS Code: Attach to Running Container

input: Design Kubernetes deployment for Spring Boot microservices with Blue-Green deployment strategy

output.deployment:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-deployment-blue
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: api
        image: artifactory.api.com/api:blue
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
output.service:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: api
    slot: blue
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8080
output.blue_green:
kubectl set image deployment/api-deployment-* api=artifactory.api.com/api:green
kubectl rollout status deployment/api-deployment-green
kubectl patch service api-service -p '{"spec":{"selector":{"slot":"green"}}}'

input: Set up monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana for containerized applications

output.prometheus:
global:
  scrape_interval: 15s
scrape_configs:
  - job_name: 'prometheus'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['localhost:9090']
  - job_name: 'containers'
    static_configs:
      - targets: ['cadvisor:8080']
output.grafana_dashboard:
panels:
  - title: CPU Usage
    targets:
      - expr: rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total[5m])
  - title: Memory Usage
    targets:
      - expr: container_memory_usage_bytes
output.alerts:
groups:
  - name: containers
    rules:
    - alert: HighCpu
      expr: avg(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total[5m])) > 0.8
      for: 5m

input: Configure Terraform for AWS VPC with public and private subnets across 3 availability zones
Create GitHub Actions workflow for monorepo with selective deployment based on changed packages

output.workflow:
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  detect-changes:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      api: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.api }}
      web: ${{ steps.filter.outputs.web }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: dorny/paths-filter@v2
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            api: 'packages/api/**'
            web: 'packages/web/**'

  deploy-api:
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.api == 'true'
    steps:
      - run: echo "Deploying API"

  deploy-web:
    needs: detect-changes
    if: needs.detect-changes.outputs.web == 'true'
    steps:
      - run: echo "Deploying Web"

input: Set up Docker Compose for local development with PostgreSQL, Redis, and application services

output.compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  app:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:secret@db:5432/app
      REDIS_URL: redis://cache:6379
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      cache:
        condition: service_started

  db:
    image: postgres:15-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: secret
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

  cache:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes

input: Configure auto-scaling for ECS Fargate with target tracking policies
Create Nginx reverse proxy configuration with SSL termination and load balancing
Set up ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) for centralized logging in Docker

output.compose:
version: '3.8'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.11.0
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - xpack.security.enabled=true
      - ELASTIC_PASSWORD=secret
    volumes:
      - es_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.11.0
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.11.0
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

volumes:
  es_data:
